title: Iliad, Book 7: The Duel of Hector and Ajax
description: Book 7 of Homer's Iliad: The Duel of Hector and Ajax.
introduction: Book 7 of the Iliad: The Duel of Hector and Ajax. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.text: Glorious Hector rushed out through the gates. He challenged the Greeks to single combat. Ajax came forward, huge as a wall. They fought until darkness fell, then exchanged gifts and parted with honor.
